title: Lindernia crustacea
taxonomy: Lindernia crustacea belongs to the family Linderniaceae, a family of aquatic plants. This plant is classified within the order Lamiales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Lindernia crustacea is further classified as Lindernia within the genus Lindernia, a group of small, delicate plants. The species Lindernia crustacea is native to Australia, where it is often found in freshwater environments. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the plant kingdom.
